rules.name: Standalone Capitalized Names in Lists/Contexts
rules.description: Captures standalone capitalized words that appear to be names in specific contexts, excluding sentence starters and common legal nouns.

rules.name: Full Names with Titles
rules.description: Captures full names preceded by titles like Dr., Prof., Dipl.-Ing., etc., ensuring the title is not captured.

rules.name: Anonymized Initials with Dots
rules.description: Captures anonymized names consisting of a capital letter followed by a dot (e.g., 'N.', 'K.', 'R.', 'S.').

rules.name: Anonymized Names with Ellipsis
rules.description: Captures anonymized names with ellipsis or numbers (e.g., 'S …', 'M2 …').

rules.name: Names after 'Herr'
rules.description: Captures names immediately following the word 'Herr', handling optional titles.

rules.name: Names after 'Angeklagte' or 'Kläger'
rules.description: Captures names following legal role indicators, including anonymized names.

rules.name: 'von' + Name Pattern
rules.description: Captures names following the preposition 'von', excluding common non-name words.

rules.name: Full Names with Titles
rules.description: Captures full names preceded by titles like Dr., Prof., Dipl.-Ing., etc., ensuring the title is not captured.

rules.name: Anonymized Initials with Dots
rules.description: Captures anonymized names consisting of a capital letter followed by a dot (e.g., 'H.', 'R.', 'K.'), often preceded by role indicators like 'Zeugin', 'Zeuge', 'Angeklagten'.

rules.name: Names after 'Herr'
rules.description: Captures names immediately following the word 'Herr', handling optional titles.

rules.name: Names after 'Angeklagte' or 'Kläger'
rules.description: Captures names following legal role indicators, including anonymized names.

rules.name: Names after 'Herr' or 'Frau'
rules.description: Captures names immediately following the honorifics 'Herr' or 'Frau', handling optional titles.

rules.name: Hyphenated Surnames
rules.description: Captures hyphenated surnames (e.g., 'Sost-Scheible', 'Meier-Beck').

rules.name: Names after 'von' (Noble/Preposition)
rules.description: Captures names following the preposition 'von', excluding common non-name words and titles.

rules.name: Names after Legal Roles
rules.description: Captures names following legal role indicators like 'Angeklagten', 'Kläger', 'Zeugen', 'Richter', 'Geschädigten', 'Vorsitzenden', etc., ensuring titles are not included in the capture.

rules.name: Anonymized Names with Ellipsis
rules.description: Captures anonymized names with numbers and ellipsis (e.g., 'K1 …', 'B2 …').

rules.name: Anonymized Initials with Ellipsis
rules.description: Captures anonymized names with ellipsis (e.g., 'L. ...', 'Ch. ...', 'W ...'), often preceded by role indicators.

rules.name: Anonymized Initials in Lists
rules.description: Captures anonymized initials in lists of defendants (e.g., 'K. , O. , J. und P.').

rules.name: Anonymized Initials after 'von'
rules.description: Captures anonymized initials following 'von' (e.g., 'von K.').

rules.name: Known Surnames
rules.description: Captures specific known surnames from training data (Kokott, Koch, Brühler, Demir, Baykara, Karaçay, Urcan, Kaya, Cirener).
